title: Amolliar Apothecary Jars Bathroom Storage Organizer - Cute Qtip Dispenser Holder Vanity Canister Jar Glass with Lid for Cotton Swabs,Rounds,Bath Salts,Makeup Sponges,Hair Accessories/Black（2 Pack）
description:
About this item
Metal
✅ STORAGE MADE STYLISH - This sleek vanity qtip holder provides a decorative accent to your powder room, bathroom vanity, makeup table and more; The unique design with removable lid gives you a variety of storage options.This canister is great for storing and organizing cotton swabs, ovals and rounds, makeup applicators, cosmetic sponges, wedges, guest soaps, bath bombs, balls, salts and more.It is easy to access the items inside, but*LIDS CANNOT SCREW ON THE JAR*.
✅ FUNCTIONAL & VERSATILE - The space saving design provides plenty of room for storing a multitude of small essentials; Organize your hair accessories - holds hair ties, clips, elastic bands, bobby pins, bows and more; Use in home office for paperclips, rubber bands, binder clips, and stamps.
✅SIMPLE AND FUNCTIONLA - 8OZ glass jar and Stainless steel lid. PS:THE LIDS CANNOT SCREW ON THE JAR,just stand on the jar.It makes it so much easier to lift off the top and reach in the items inside.Package includes:2 pack jars and lids.Cute Waterproof chalkboard label stickers are send for free
✅ COMPACT STORAGE - This bathroom organizer is compact, protecting your makeup and hair accessories without taking up too much space on the countertop or table. With this tasteful, crystal-clear container in your bathroom organization arsenal, you can tastefully take charge of your own space and keep track of all your things.This not only helps you locate items easily but keeps them clean and sanitary, too.
✅ 100% CUSTOMER SATISFACTION GUARANTEED - If quality and Transport damage problems can choose a replacement or refund,you can enjoy unconditional return and refund serivce .Do not hesitate to contact us if you have any questions. Customer satisfaction is on our top priority.
› See more product details
reviews_5s: I rarely give all 5’s, but this item was a pleasant surprise. The tops do not screw on so you can quickly grab that tip, cottonball or wisp. BUT there is a small silicone lining that keeps the top SNUG, but not too tight. A simple thing but it was surprising what a clever touch that was to have a lid that does not jiggle or tinkle. I guess you could say it is QUIET. The glass is NOT fragile and the color finish seems quality so I am not expecting the color to fade or rub off on the lid. I think the brand itself is the key.I needed to replace my bathroom containers for q-tips, cotton balls etc.. These jars are great looking, the tops stay put with a slight suction. I do wish they came in different sizes, but I am very happy with them. They seem well made.Gave the perfect aesthetic I was looking for in my bathroom and I love that it came with the labeled stickers. Will buy again!Not to big for the bathroom counter and not to small to be useful for Q-tips, cotton balls, dental floss picks, etc. Easy to open, nice quality.Great product 👍👍👍These jars are such a cute addition to my bathroom. They fit just enough and are very easy to clean. They are sturdy and the lids are sealed, not allowing any water that is splashed around to enter. Although, I do wish the lids were twist on as they can fall off easily if bumped. Overall, these are cute accessories and a good value for your money.I think they will help control the nonstop mess on my bathroom counter!Great addition to my new remodeled bathroom.These cute little jars are perfect for keeping small items organized. I use them to store things I use daily in the bathroom. The color is the covers is neutral so they will go with any decor theme.Just love these jars. Looks great in my bathroom.
reviews_1s: These jars came and were dirty! Yuck!These are so small they aren't functionalThank god these are $12 for two but to be honest they should be $5. I was super excited for these but to be honest the lid doesn't even close securely, it sits loosely on top and doesn't seal at all. Waste of Coin. Going to get some from dollar tree or TJ maxx at this point. Save your coin.Seller does not wrap these well at all. Had it come broken twice, had to go to UPS twice to return it. waste of time and money. Lids are not great quality anyways.Because it is brokenIf I could still return this I would. It's basically just a plain lidded jar that has been painted gold. Cheap looking. Not worth the price.The lids don't screw they just are there, not sturdy at all. I could of probably found better quality at the dollar tree and just spray painted the tops black tbhThe product was packed while inside the product then placed in a big box. I could hear the broken pieces before opening box.DissatisfiedBe careful when opening. Both of the lids suction to the jars just enough that when you try to lift the lid off, it'll lift the entire jar, then the suction will release and the jar will drop and break.
